content: Hi, I'm looking for some new books to read. I've been so busy with work lately.
What kind of books are you in the mood for?

I'm not sure, I've been listening to a lot of sci-fi podcasts lately and I think I'd like something that combines my love of tech with a good story. I've been working as a financial analyst at Goldman Sachs and I'm actually planning to buy a house in Salt Lake City, UT.
That sounds like a great combination! There are some excellent books about sci-fi and tech out there. Have you considered 'Dune' by Frank Herbert?
No, I haven't. I'll have to check it out. I've been meaning to get back into reading more, but it's hard to find the time. I've been renovating my new house and it's been taking up a lot of my time.
Wow, you must be very dedicated to your new home. Do you have a favorite book or author that you always come back to?
Yeah, I love Isaac Asimov. I've read all of his books and I'm always excited to see what new adaptations come out. I've even got a signed copy of 'Foundation' that I treasure.
That's amazing! A signed copy of 'Foundation' must be very valuable. Have you ever thought about writing your own book?
Ha! I don't think so, I don't think I'm a good enough writer. But I do love mountain biking and I've even won a few local competitions.
That sounds like a great hobby! Mountain biking can be very exhilarating. Do you have a favorite type of music that you like to listen to while you ride?
Yeah, I love listening to electronic music. There's something about the beat that just works for me. I've even started learning how to surf and I'm planning to take a trip to Hawaii on February 20th.
That's impressive! You must be very adventurous. Have you ever thought about sharing your travel experiences with others?
It was nice chatting with you, Finley.
